profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Lionmesh Prima Tbk engages in the manufacturing and selling welded steel wire mesh products primarily in Indonesia. It offers wire mesh, fences and accessories, drawn wire, and lionmesh practical columns. The company is also involved in providing office equipment and building materials. The company was formerly known as PT Lion Weldmesh Prima. PT Lionmesh Prima Tbk was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
